mapper.select: /** UsptRsltDao.select */ select rslt_id , apply_id , rslt_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RSLT_CODE_GROUP}', rslt_sttus_cd) as rslt_sttus , presentn_dt , makeup_req_de , makeup_req_cn , makeup_attachment_group_id , attachment_group_id , sndng_mth , sndng_cn , recent_send_date , rslt_ym , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_rslt where rslt_id = #{rsltId}

/** UsptRsltDao.select */ select rslt_id , apply_id , rslt_sttus_cd , presentn_dt , makeup_req_de , makeup_req_cn , makeup_attachment_group_id , attachment_group_id , sndng_mth , sndng_cn , recent_send_date , rslt_ym , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_rslt where apply_id = #{applyId}

/** UsptRsltDao.select */ select rslt_id , apply_id , rslt_sttus_cd , presentn_dt , makeup_req_de , makeup_req_cn , makeup_attachment_group_id , attachment_group_id , sndng_mth , sndng_cn , recent_send_date , rslt_ym , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_rslt where apply_id = #{applyId} and rslt_ym = #{rsltYm}

/** UsptRsltDao.selectFrontListCount */ select count(ur.rslt_id) from uspt_rslt ur inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = ur.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = ubpa.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ub.enabled = true inner join uspt_stdr_bsns usb on usb.stdr_bsns_cd = ub.stdr_bsns_cd and usb.bsns_type_cd != '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@BSNS_TYPE_MVN_CODE}'

/** UsptRsltDao.selectFrontList */ select ur.rslt_id , ur.rslt_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RSLT_CODE_GROUP}', ur.rslt_sttus_cd) as rslt_sttus , ur.presentn_dt , ubpa.receipt_no , ubpat.task_nm_ko as task_nm , ubp.pblanc_nm , row_number() over (order by ur.created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_rslt ur inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = ur.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = ubpa.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ub.enabled = true inner join uspt_stdr_bsns usb on usb.stdr_bsns_cd = ub.stdr_bsns_cd and usb.bsns_type_cd != '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@BSNS_TYPE_MVN_CODE}'
